hero.subtitle: Join 42,000 Qatari neighbours buying, selling, and finding their next favourite thing.
hero.bullet_local: Built for Qatar, in your time zone

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your QBazaar account.
login.deactivated_notice: Your account is deactivated. Sign in to reactivate it.
login.deleted_notice: Your account is scheduled for deletion. Sign in within 30 days to cancel.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: It takes less than a minute.
register.password_hint: At least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number and symbol.
register.terms_prefix: By creating an account you agree to the
register.success: Account created. Phone verification lands in the next wave.

verify_otp.title: Verify your phone
verify_otp.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to
verify_otp.missing_phone_body: We couldn't find the phone number to verify. Please go back and sign up or sign in again.
verify_otp.success_body: Your phone is now verified — continue exploring QBazaar.
verify_otp.sent_again: A fresh code is on its way
verify_otp.send_failed: We couldn't send the code, please try again

forgot_password.title: Forgot password?
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot_password.success_body: If that email exists in our system, we've sent you a link to reset your password. Don't forget to check the spam folder.

reset_password.title: Set a new password
reset_password.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.
reset_password.missing_params_body: The link you followed is incomplete or expired. Please request a new one from the forgot-password page.

verify_email.success_body: Thanks for confirming your email. You now have full access to QBazaar.
verify_email.expired_body: This verification link is no longer valid or has already been used. You can request a fresh one.
verify_email.resend_success: A fresh verification link is on its way
verify_email.resend_failed: We couldn't send the link, please try again
verify_email.missing_params_body: The link you followed is missing the data we need to verify your email.

errors.phone_invalid: Enter a valid Qatar number (+974 then 8 digits)
errors.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.identifier_required: Enter your email or phone number
errors.identifier_invalid: Enter a valid email, or a Qatari phone in the form +974XXXXXXXX
errors.terms_required: You must accept the terms to continue
errors.AUTH_002: Your account is suspended — please contact support
errors.AUTH_003: Please verify your phone number first
errors.AUTH_004: This code has expired, request a new one
errors.AUTH_005: Incorrect code, please double-check and try again
errors.AUTH_006: Too many attempts, please wait a moment
errors.AUTH_008: This phone number is already registered
errors.AUTH_009: Your session expired, please sign in again
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many attempts, try again later

dashboard.subtitle: A quick snapshot of your QBazaar activity.

recent_activity.title: Recent activity
recent_activity.coming_soon: Coming soon — this is where your latest activity will appear.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Update the information visitors see on your public profile.
profile.bio_placeholder: Tell other QBazaar members a bit about yourself (optional).

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Change your password regularly to keep your account safe.
security.sign_out_notice: This will sign you out from other devices.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.subtitle: Devices currently signed in to your account.
sessions.empty_body: We couldn't find any other active sessions for your account.

verification.title: Verification
verification.subtitle: Boost trust on QBazaar by completing the verification steps.
verification.email_sent: Verification link sent to your email
verification.email_send_failed: We couldn't send the link, try again later

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Control what other QBazaar members can see about you.

fields.show_phone_desc: Let visitors see your phone number on your profile and ads.
fields.show_email_desc: Show your email address to signed-in members.
fields.allow_chat_desc: Let buyers message you directly through QBazaar.
fields.indexed_by_search_desc: Allow search engines to index your public profile.

privacy.save_failed: Couldn't save settings — we restored the previous value

blocked_users.title: Blocked users
blocked_users.subtitle: These members can't message you or see your ads.

data.title: Data & account
data.subtitle: Export your data or close your account.

export.title: Export my data
export.body: Download a copy of your QBazaar data — profile, ads, messages, and activity history. We'll prepare the archive and email you a secure download link.
export.queued_body: We emailed you a download link — check your inbox in a few minutes. You can come back to this page later to request a fresh copy.

deactivate.title: Deactivate my account
deactivate.body: Your profile, ads, and messages will be hidden from other members. Sign back in any time to restore them — nothing is deleted.
deactivate.dialog_body: Confirm your password to deactivate. You can reactivate at any time by signing in again.
deactivate.reason_placeholder: Tell us why you're leaving (optional, up to 280 characters).

delete.title: Delete my account
delete.body: Schedules your account for permanent deletion in 30 days. After that we erase your profile, ads, and messages. Sign in again within the window to cancel.
delete.dialog_body: Your account will be scheduled for deletion in 30 days. Sign in again within that window to cancel.
delete.reason_placeholder: Tell us why you're leaving (optional, up to 280 characters).
delete.scheduled_toast: Account scheduled for deletion in 30 days. Sign in again to cancel.

avatar.title: Profile photo
avatar.subtitle: A clear photo helps buyers trust you. Square images work best.
avatar.supported: JPG, PNG, or WEBP. Up to 5 MB.
avatar.crop_subtitle: Drag to reposition. Use the slider to zoom.
avatar.upload_failed: Couldn't upload your photo, please try again

errors.type: Use a JPG, PNG, or WEBP file
errors.size: The image is too large (max 5 MB)
errors.read: We couldn't read that image — please pick another

errors.password_same_as_current: Choose a password different from your current one
errors.USER_005: You don't have permission to view this
errors.USER_006: Please confirm your password to deactivate
errors.USER_007: Please confirm your password to delete your account
errors.USER_008: An export is already being prepared — check your email
errors.USER_009: That file doesn't look like a supported image
errors.USER_010: The image is too large (max 5 MB)

profile.no_bio: This member hasn't written a bio yet.
profile.ads_empty_body: {name} doesn't have any active ads right now.
profile.not_found_body: The account may have been removed or the link is invalid.

block.confirm_body: They won't be able to message you or see your ads. You can unblock them later from your account settings.
